# {{PROJECT_DISPLAY_NAME}}

Production-oriented Fastify API starter generated with LaunchStack CLI.

## Included

- Fastify server bootstrap
- TypeScript
- Environment configuration
- Structured logging
- CORS support
- Sensible HTTP utilities
- Central error handler
- Structured not-found responses
- Health endpoint
- Graceful shutdown
- Vitest integration tests

## Requirements

Node.js 20 or newer.

## Setup

Install dependencies:

    npm install

Create the environment file:

    cp .env.example .env

Start development mode:

    npm run dev

The API starts on:

    http://localhost:3000

Health endpoint:

    GET http://localhost:3000/health

## Quality Commands

Run tests:

    npm test

Run type checking:

    npm run typecheck

Build the project:

    npm run build

Start the production build:

    npm start

## Structure

    src/
      config/
        env.ts
      plugins/
        config.ts
        cors.ts
        error-handler.ts
        index.ts
        sensible.ts
      routes/
        health.ts
        index.ts
      types/
        fastify.d.ts
      app.ts
      server.ts
    tests/
      health.test.ts
